root.name: Replace Slide 11 diagram with a simpler flowchart: 'Browser → HTTP Request → Web Server → HTTP Response → Browser'
root.description: Evaluate whether the agent replaced the existing diagram on Slide 11 with a simpler flowchart showing the specified sequence.

children.name: Existing diagram on Slide 11 is removed
children.description: Checks that the original diagram on slide 11 is deleted or replaced.

children.name: Flowchart with correct sequence is present on Slide 11
children.description: Checks that a flowchart with the exact sequence 'Browser → HTTP Request → Web Server → HTTP Response → Browser' is present on Slide 11.

children.name: Flowchart is simple (not overly complex)
children.description: Checks that the flowchart is simple and does not contain extraneous steps or elements.

children.name: No extraneous slides added or removed
children.description: Checks that no slides were added or removed in the presentation.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or features
children.description: Checks that no unrelated changes were made to slides other than slide 11, or to slide 11's animations/transitions or other features.

children.name: No extraneous text/font changes on other slides
children.description: Checks that text and font properties on slides other than slide 11 were not changed.

children.name: No extraneous changes to animations or transitions on any slide
children.description: Checks that no animation or transition was added, removed, or modified in the presentation.

metadata.task: Slide 11: Replace the existing diagram with a simpler flowchart showing 'Browser → HTTP Request → Web Server → HTTP Response → Browser'
